summary: Iteration 97: BIQc Pre-Launch Validation Protocol - Complete testing of public pages responsiveness (Desktop/Tablet/Mobile), auth flows, authenticated routes, and multi-tenant data isolation. 18/19 backend API tests pass (1 minor test code fix needed). All UI tests pass.

minor.issue: Response structure has cognitive=null sometimes, test handles this gracefully

issues: 14 touch targets under 44px height - mostly nav links at 32px height. Acceptable for secondary nav elements but could improve accessibility

section_3_homepage_responsiveness.desktop_1920x1080: PASS - No horizontal scroll, hero section visible, all nav items accessible
section_3_homepage_responsiveness.tablet_768x1024: PASS - No horizontal scroll, hamburger menu present, content readable
section_3_homepage_responsiveness.mobile_375x812: PASS - No horizontal scroll, base font 15px (>14px), form usability good

section_3a_desktop_public_pages.homepage: PASS - Hero, stats, CTA sections all visible
section_3a_desktop_public_pages.login: PASS - Email/password inputs, Google/Microsoft OAuth buttons present
section_3a_desktop_public_pages.register: PASS - All required fields (name, email, company, password, confirm) + OAuth buttons

section_3b_tablet_responsiveness.horizontal_scroll: PASS - None on all tested pages

section_3c_mobile_responsiveness.homepage_render: PASS - All sections visible and readable
section_3c_mobile_responsiveness.login_page: PASS - Form usable, no horizontal scroll
section_3c_mobile_responsiveness.register_page: PASS - All fields visible and accessible

section_4_registration_flow.register_page_fields: PASS - name, email, company, industry, password, confirm password all present

section_4_login_flow.test_credentials_test1: PASS - trent-test1@biqc-test.com / BIQcTest!2026A logs in successfully
section_4_login_flow.invalid_credentials: PASS - API returns 401 for invalid credentials

section_10_multi_tenant_isolation.user1_sees_own_data: PASS - User trent-test1 can access their business data
section_10_multi_tenant_isolation.user1_cannot_see_user3_data: PASS - No Thankyou Group data visible to user1
section_10_multi_tenant_isolation.api_isolation: PASS - /api/auth/supabase/me returns correct user per token

critical_code_review_comments: GOOD: Login page (LoginSupabase.js) has all required data-testid attributes for automated testing
GOOD: Register page (RegisterSupabase.js) has all required fields with proper validation (password match check)
GOOD: Mobile CSS (mobile.css) handles responsiveness well with proper breakpoints
GOOD: DashboardLayout.js properly shows sidebar navigation with section groupings
GOOD: Auth flow correctly routes to /advisor for calibrated users, /calibration for new users
MINOR: Some tablet nav links are 32px height (below 44px touch target guideline) - cosmetic issue
context_for_next_testing_agent: All BIQc Pre-Launch Validation Protocol sections pass. Public pages (/, /pricing, /blog, /login, /register) render correctly at Desktop/Tablet/Mobile viewports with no horizontal scroll. Login with trent-test1@biqc-test.com works and redirects to /advisor. All authenticated routes accessible. Multi-tenant data isolation verified - users see only their own business data. Minor issue: 14 nav links on tablet are 32px height instead of recommended 44px.
rca_of_issues: No blocking issues. Single test failure was a test code bug (NoneType handling) which has been fixed.
